metadata.name: Peter Bird PB2002 present-day plate boundaries
metadata.citation: Bird, P. (2003). An updated digital model of plate boundaries. Geochemistry Geophysics Geosystems, 4(3), 1027. doi:10.1029/2001GC000252.
notes: Boundary classes are grouped into convergent, divergent, and transform categories for the browser map.
Longitudes greater than 180° are normalized into the [-180, 180] range.
Coordinates are rounded to 0.001° for lighter browser payloads.
